'''竏喇-sh-t-j''' ('''kahashtejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xerocopy|xerocopy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-t-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xerocopy|xerocopy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-sh-t-j
|-
! Lemma
| kahashtejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihashtejoko|thihashtejoko]] || [[word:jihashtejoko|jihashtejoko]] || [[word:shihashtejoko|shihashtejoko]] || [[word:kihashtejoko|kihashtejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhashtejoko|thuthuhashtejoko]] || [[word:jujuhashtejoko|jujuhashtejoko]] || [[word:shushuhashtejoko|shushuhashtejoko]] || [[word:kukuhashtejoko|kukuhashtejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohashtejoko|thohashtejoko]] || [[word:johashtejoko|johashtejoko]] || [[word:shohashtejoko|shohashtejoko]] || [[word:kohashtejoko|kohashtejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohashtejoko|thohashtejoko]] || [[word:johashtejoko|johashtejoko]] || [[word:shohashtejoko|shohashtejoko]] || [[word:kohashtejoko|kohashtejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦhashtejoko|thﾃｦhashtejoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦhashtejoko|jﾃｦhashtejoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦhashtejoko|shﾃｦhashtejoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦhashtejoko|kﾃｦhashtejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahashtejoko|thathahashtejoko]] || [[word:jajahashtejoko|jajahashtejoko]] || [[word:shashahashtejoko|shashahashtejoko]] || [[word:kakahashtejoko|kakahashtejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahashtejoko|thahashtejoko]] || [[word:jahashtejoko|jahashtejoko]] || [[word:shahashtejoko|shahashtejoko]] || [[word:kahashtejoko|kahashtejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahashtejoko|thahashtejoko]] || [[word:jahashtejoko|jahashtejoko]] || [[word:shahashtejoko|shahashtejoko]] || [[word:kahashtejoko|kahashtejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shahashtejithi|shahashtejithi]] || [[word:shahashtejiji|shahashtejiji]] || [[word:shahashtejishi|shahashtejishi]] || [[word:shahashtejiki|shahashtejiki]]
